title: forsythia × intermedia var. spectabilis
intro: Forsythia × intermedia var. spectabilis, also known as the Golden Bell or Spectabilis Forsythia, is a hybrid deciduous shrub derived from the cross between Forsythia intermedia and Forsythia suspensa, known for its vibrant yellow flowers and cold hardiness. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Forsythia × intermedia var. spectabilis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and colds. Forsythia × intermedia var. spectabilis can be used in herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs like echinacea and ginger.
